name: @mentraos/shared-schemas
description: Canonical JSON Schemas and multi-language models for Capture Bundle v1 (Global Refinement Layer)

scripts.test: npm run prepare:ts-schemas && npm run test --workspace=@mentraos/capture-bundle-schemas
scripts.ci: npm run prepare:ts-schemas && npm run validate:schemas && npm run build --workspace=@mentraos/capture-bundle-schemas && npm test
